EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not delete a certificate on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not add a certificate on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted a certificate on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added a certificate on host {event_src.host}
